calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn P. Espey, for and with Petitioner Mary E. Manning.

Ms. Espey stated that she had responded to the Court Examiner's remarks by the filing of a supplemental declaration which addressed the concerns which had been raised. She further stated that the requested restrictions on ongoing use of estate funds was addressed in provisions at pages 8 and 9 of the proposed order provided to the Court. The matter was taken under submission by the Court.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
